docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELL, LINDA AS TO DEFENDANT HANSEN, ELIZABETH DOES 1 THROUGH 12, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-09-2005 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-07-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-25-2005
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR AUG-02-2005 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
DECLARATION OF DOMINICK R. LIBONATI IN OPPOSITION TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELL, LINDA
BEFORE HEARING, PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY THE COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELL, LINDA JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 DAYS

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-31-2005 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-09-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 225 SET FOR JAN-10-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. OCT-31-2005 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF DOMINICK R. LIBONATI IN OPPOSITION TO ORDER TO SHOW FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELL, LINDA
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
CRC 225 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-10-2006 IS OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
